query:
SELECT 'deletion_log' AS source, poNumber AS ref1, deletedProducts AS ref2, deletedByName AS ref3, createdAt AS ref4 FROM purchase_order_deletion_logs WHERE poNumber = 'PO-20260512-01'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'backup', poNumber, backupLabel, CAST(productCount AS CHAR), createdAt FROM import_batch_backups WHERE poNumber = 'PO-20260512-01'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'batch_owner', batchNo, poNumber, productCode, createdAt FROM products WHERE batchNo IN (
'01400003031','01400003032','01400003033','01400003034','01400003035','01400003036','01400003037','01400003038','01400003039',
'01400003040','01400003041','01400003042','01400003043','01400003044','01400003045','01400003046','01400003047','01400003048'
)
ORDER BY source, ref1, ref4;
